title: Care Gap Bundle Detail
description: View and manage a care gap condition bundle with three tabs: Design for configuring the bundle's measures, Compliance Results for evaluating patient compliance against a data source, and Overlap Rules for defining how measures interact. Includes an overall compliance ring and full evaluation history.
tips: The Design tab lets you configure the measures and criteria that define this care gap bundle using the Bundle Designer.
Use the Compliance Results tab to evaluate the bundle against a specific data source. Select a source and click Evaluate to run the analysis.
Compliance results show an overall compliance percentage, total patients, gaps met, open gaps, and excluded patient counts.
The compliance ring in the header gives you an at-a-glance view of the latest evaluation's overall compliance percentage.
The Measure Compliance Table breaks down compliance by individual measure so you can identify which specific gaps need attention.
The Overlap Rules tab lets you define how multiple measures within the bundle interact and handle patient overlap scenarios.
Every evaluation is saved in the Evaluation History section. Click any past evaluation to review its results without re-running.
Disease category and bundle code badges in the header help you quickly identify and categorize the condition bundle.
